case_title: KIN WAI YUEN VS. CHRISTOPHER WILLIAMS JONES

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, KIN WAI AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, CHRISTOPHER WILLIAMS
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-09-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-27-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, CHRISTOPHER WILLIAMS
